mapper.select:
select primaryDataSourceCh,secondaryDataSourceCh ,primaryOrganizationCh,secondaryOrganizationCh, tableType, tableProject ,name , tableNameEn ,tableAllCount , averageDailyVolume , yesterdayCount ,lifeCycle , valueRate , nullRate ,tableState,statisticsTimeStr,updateType ,frequency,liveType,tableid,registerState,objectId,tableSize,objectState, -- labels, updateDate,updatePeriod,productStage,organizationClassifyCh,dataSourceClassifyCh,exceptionMessage,lifeCycleStatus from( select PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryDataSourceCh , SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as secondaryDataSourceCh , PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryOrganizationCh , SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as secondaryOrganizationCh , case when SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH is null or SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH ='' then PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH else PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH||'->'||SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH end as organizationClassifyCh, case when SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH is null or SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH ='' then PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH else PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH ||'->'|| SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH end as dataSourceClassifyCh, TABLE_TYPE||'->'||TABLE_PROJECT as tableProject , NAME as name , TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn , case when TABLE_ALL_COUNT = '0' then '0' when to_char(TABLE_ALL_COUNT/ 10000, 'fm9999999999990.00')='0.00' then '0' else to_char(TABLE_ALL_COUNT/ 10000, 'fm9999999999990.00') End as tableAllCount, AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME as averageDailyVolume, case when YESTERDAY_COUNT = '0' then '0' when to_char(YESTERDAY_COUNT/10000,'fm999999999990.00') = '0.00' then '0' else to_char(YESTERDAY_COUNT/10000,'fm999999999990.00') end as yesterdayCount ,TABLE_TYPE as tableType, LIFE_CYCLE as lifeCycle , VALUE_RATE as valueRate , NULL_RATE as nullRate, TABLE_STATE as tableState,OBJECT_STATE as objectState, case when PARTITION_MESSAGE = 0 then '增量' when PARTITION_MESSAGE = 1 then '全量' else '其它' END as updateType ,to_char(STATISTICS_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') as statisticsTimeStr , FREQUENCY as frequency , LIVETYPE as liveType ,SJXJBM as tableid,REGISTER_STATE as registerState,OBJECT_ID as objectId,case when TABLE_SIZE = '0' then '0' when to_char(TABLE_SIZE/1073741824,'fm999999999990.00')='0.00' then '0' else to_char(TABLE_SIZE/1073741824,'fm999999999990.00') end as tableSize, -- labels, update_date as updateDate,update_period as updatePeriod,'' as productStage, EXCEPTION_MESSAGE as exceptionMessage,LIFE_CYCLE_STATUS as lifeCycleStatus from ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) )a where
upper(a.TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{item.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and upper(a.TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and upper(a.TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{item.tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 )
